title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXIX. Relics.
content:
How many days has my baby to play?
            Saturday, Sunday, Monday,
        Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday,
            Saturday, Sunday, Monday.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXXIX. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
